'''Estral''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Etti]] who worked as a gamemaster in the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="BFH">''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''</ref>
